original_abstract: This study explores the implementation of religious character education through the culture of Quran literacy in Amaliyah Sunggal Private Islamic Senior High School. The main objective of this study is to identify and analyze how the culture of Quran literacy contributes to the formation of students' religious character and its impact on their learning and daily lives. The research method used is qualitative descriptive, involving observation, interviews, and documentation studies. Data analysis begins with data reduction, data presentation and drawing conclusions. Then to ensure the validity of the data, this study uses triangulation in order to increase the accuracy and credibility of the findings. The results of the study indicate that the implementation of the culture of Quran literacy has a positive impact on the development of students' religious character, increasing discipline, understanding of Islamic values, social sensitivity, and strengthening religious identity. However, this study also identified obstacles such as lack of student interest, limited teacher resources, dense curriculum, and negative influences of the social and technological environment. Strategies involving improving teacher competence, effective time management, and support from parents and the community are needed to overcome these obstacles.
humanized_abstract: This study aims to reveal and analyze the culture of Quran literacy in Amaliyah Sunggal Private Islamic Senior High School, as an effort to develop students' religious character. For that reason, the researcher used qualitative descriptive method which consists of observation, interviews and documentation studies. The analysis of data used in this study is data reduction, data presentation and drawing conclusion. To test the validity of the data, the researcher used triangulation method in order to increase the accuracy and reliability of the data. The results of the study showed that the culture of Quran literacy was very effective in developing students' religious character, so that students could carry out the teachings of Islam well, and behave accordingly, thus creating a sense of discipline, deep understanding of Islamic values, social feelings and strong religious identity. In addition, the study found that there were many obstacles that hindered the development of students' religious character. The obstacles were lack of interest among students, the lack of preparedness of teachers in handling the students, the heavy syllabus and also the negative impact of the surrounding society and modern society. Therefore, the solution to the obstacles found was the improvement of teacher competence, the way of using time effectively and the support of parents and cooperation from parents and the community.
